none.justification: Lists all 10 GT references across both src/utils/eloop.c and src/utils/eloop_win.c with the correct lines and no false positives. The L674 context is a little imprecise, but the reference set itself is complete and in scope.

ccodegraph.justification: Matches the GT exactly: both definitions and all 8 call sites with correct files, lines, and no comments/string-literal false positives. It also correctly treats eloop.c and eloop_win.c as alternate real platform implementations.

lsp.justification: Matches all 10 GT references with correct files and lines, and explicitly includes eloop_win.c despite it not being in the active compile_commands.json. No false positives or scope violations are included.
